title: Iced Persian Cabbage Salad
description: A resinous, fluffy salad featuring shredded red cabbage, fresh dill, and a tangy tahini-lemon dressing topped with crisp air-fried walnuts.

ingredients.name: red cabbage
ingredients.notes: shredded finely for a crisp texture

instructions: Place walnuts in the air fryer basket, lightly drizzle 1 tsp olive oil, and air-fry for 5 minutes until golden and fragrant.
In a large bowl, combine sliced cabbage, grated carrot, and chopped dill.
Whisk together lemon juice, remaining olive oil, tahini, sumac, salt, and pepper until smooth.
Pour the dressing over the cabbage mixture and toss until evenly coated.
Fold in the freshly air-fried walnuts, reserving a few for garnish.
Chill the salad in the refrigerator for at least 15 minutes to allow flavors to meld.
Serve the salad over a bed of mixed greens or as a side dish, garnishing with reserved walnuts.
